creator: gonzo@FreeBSD.org
text:
I tested two scenarios and couldn't reproduce this issue:

- Take bug, add myself to Cc
- Take bug, leave comment

Bug list strategy is set to "Stay on updated bug"

We're on Bugzilla 5.0 now so probably it was fixed during update from 4.4.

Closing as "Overcome by events", please re-open if issue is still happening.
